queries.question: Provide me the descriptions of sports that are common to all resorts
queries.sql: SELECT Winter_Sports.Description  from Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports join Winter_Sports on Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.SportID = Winter_Sports.SportID join Mountain_Resorts on Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.ResortID = Mountain_Resorts.ResortID   GROUP BY Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.SportID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.ResortID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Mountain_Resorts)

queries.question: For each mountain resort, provide the corresponding names and descriptions of winter sports.
queries.sql: select mountain_resorts.name , winter_sports.name , winter_sports.description from Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports join Winter_Sports on Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.SportID = Winter_Sports.SportID join Mountain_Resorts on Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.ResortID = Mountain_Resorts.ResortID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?description WHERE {
  ?mountain_resorts_winter_sports a :Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports .
  ?winter_sports a :Winter_Sports .
  ?mountain_resorts_winter_sports p:hasWinter_Sports ?winter_sports .
  ?mountain_resorts a :Mountain_Resorts .
  ?mountain_resorts_winter_sports p:hasMountain_Resorts ?mountain_resorts .
  ?mountain_resorts p:name ?name .
  ?winter_sports p:name ?name2 .
  ?winter_sports p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: Which winter sports are popular among all mountain resorts?
queries.sql: SELECT Winter_Sports.Name  from Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports join Winter_Sports on Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.SportID = Winter_Sports.SportID join Mountain_Resorts on Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.ResortID = Mountain_Resorts.ResortID   GROUP BY Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.SportID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.ResortID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Mountain_Resorts)

queries.question: Which names and descriptions of winter sports are associated with every mountain resort?
queries.sql: SELECT Winter_Sports.Name, Winter_Sports.Description  from Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports join Winter_Sports on Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.SportID = Winter_Sports.SportID join Mountain_Resorts on Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.ResortID = Mountain_Resorts.ResortID   GROUP BY Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.SportID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.ResortID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Mountain_Resorts)

queries.question: For every mountain resort, show the winter sports they offer.
queries.sql: select mountain_resorts.name , winter_sports.name from Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports join Winter_Sports on Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.SportID = Winter_Sports.SportID join Mountain_Resorts on Mountain_Resorts_Winter_Sports.ResortID = Mountain_Resorts.ResortID

ambiguous_dsl.question: What sport descriptions do we have for every resort
Which names and descriptions of winter sports are associated with every mountain resort?
Give me the winter sports that each mountain resort offers.
